description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a collared shirt layered under a pullover sweater with a crest emblem on the left chest. He wears fitted pants and classic lace-up sneakers, giving him a relaxed yet put-together appearance suitable for city environments. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and short hair, and is accessorized with large, modern eyeglasses. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and natural. The clothing appears to be made of typical fabric materials, while the shoes have a rubber sole and textile upper. The overall look is that of a contemporary pedestrian, likely encountered on sidewalks or in public spaces.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a sweater, collared shirt, fitted pants, sneakers, and eyeglasses, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sweater with crest, collared shirt, eyeglasses, and full facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, beard, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sweater, pants, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left but with the opposite arm and leg visible.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt under a pullover sweater, fitted pants, and classic lace-up sneakers
